style_summary: A dense Y2K street-photo collage style with oversized cutout subjects, sticker props, loud comic typography, speech bubbles, saturated yellow-blue-green accents, and controlled high-contrast social-poster texture.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: New primary subject or group, different from the source person.
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: New visible action or pose, different from the source seated posture.
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: Invented object, product, or prop used as a foreground sticker element.
environment_variables.LOCATION: New urban or culture setting, different from the source street furniture scene.
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: Secondary scene details, surfaces, inset panels, or sticker props.
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: Invented large headline text with no copied slogan or brand wording.
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: Invented small sticker label, subtitle, or microcopy.
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: Decorative symbol for a speech bubble, badge, or callout.
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: Wardrobe or styling direction that supports the street-culture mood without copying the source outfit.
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: The visible style traits that must carry over in every generated sample.
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: Literal source content, brands, text, pose, props, and story details that must not be recreated.

style_fidelity_anchors: Dense poster collage hierarchy with one oversized cutout-photo subject.
A smaller tilted inset panel, reflection, phone-screen-like rectangle, or framed cutout.
Thick white and black sticker outlines around type, figures, props, and bubbles.
Inflated Y2K comic headline lettering with warped baseline and stacked outline.
Saturated yellow accents balanced against cobalt blue, teal green, red, white, and gray pavement tones.
Wide-angle street-camera perspective with shallow urban depth and compressed social-post framing.
Foreground props cropped large and treated like stickers, badges, or visual jokes.
Speech bubble or callout with symbolic marks instead of long readable dialogue.
Glossy, oversharpened, high-contrast photographic treatment with controlled compression texture.
Streetwear styling, baggy silhouettes, caps, sporty layers, and playful accessory details.
Chaotic but readable layout with layered diagonals, overlaps, and bottom-heavy type.
Pop-zine mood: prankish, loud, urban, game-like, and youth-culture coded.
source_content_to_avoid: Do not recreate the original seated streetwear subject or their exact body pose.
Do not reuse the original storefront or transit-stop setting.
Do not reuse the soda can, pizza slice, caution sign, cap pins, or the same prop arrangement.
Do not copy the original city/country/shirt lettering, bottom slogan, logo-like number mark, or speech-bubble symbols.
Do not include the creator signature, username, watermark, platform mark, or QR code.
Do not include recognizable real brand logos or copied package marks.
Do not copy the green-blue striped rugby shirt, yellow shoes, and teal cap combination.
Do not repeat the source story premise of a person sitting by street furniture with game or sneaker-life captions.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: Photographic Y2K streetwear collage poster with comic title treatment and sticker-prop overlays.
visual_deconstruction.layout: A large cutout subject dominates the frame while inset panels, foreground props, speech bubbles, and giant type crowd the remaining space.
visual_deconstruction.perspective: Casual wide-angle street-camera perspective, slightly tilted, with shallow urban depth and close foreground objects.
visual_deconstruction.texture: High-contrast compressed social-image sharpness, glossy photo surfaces, controlled print grain, and clean sticker edges.
visual_deconstruction.mood: Loud, playful, prankish, street-culture coded, and game-like.

composition.primary_structure: One oversized cutout-photo subject occupies 45-70 percent of the canvas, offset from center.
composition.secondary_structure: A tilted inset photo, reflective panel, or cutout object overlaps the background.
composition.type_placement: A large headline anchors the top, bottom, or corner and overlaps with photo material.
composition.prop_logic: Foreground props are scaled up, outlined, and cropped at canvas edges like stickers.
composition.density: High density with layered diagonals and very limited calm negative space.

typography.headline: Huge rounded Y2K comic or varsity-adjacent display letters with black outer keylines and white separator strokes.
typography.subtype: Small slanted labels, badge text, and sticker microcopy, kept invented and brand-free.
typography.behavior: Warped baseline, mixed fill colors, stacked outlines, and type overlapping photo cutouts.
typography.legibility: Main headline must remain readable even when partly layered with subjects and props.

color_palette.palette_behavior: High saturation on clothing, type, and props over neutral urban photographic texture.

photographic_direction.treatment: Cutout collage with sticker outlines, boosted contrast, hard whites and blacks, and controlled print/compression texture.
photographic_direction.lighting: Available city light or storefront light with punchy contrast, not cinematic studio lighting.
photographic_direction.prohibited_modes: No 3D render, no anime conversion, no flat vector poster, no clean luxury editorial.

design_rules: Keep one dominant cutout-photo subject much larger than the props and inset panel.
Use a smaller tilted inset panel or framed crop as a recurring secondary layer.
Outline important figures, props, headlines, and bubbles with thick white and black keylines.
Use a giant Y2K comic headline as a structural element, not a small caption.
Balance bright yellow, cobalt blue, teal green, red, black, and white over gray street-photo base tones.
Add at least one playful foreground prop cropped against an edge.
Use a speech bubble, badge, or callout with invented symbolic marks.
Keep texture intentional and clean; preserve high resolution and legibility.
do: Use realistic photo subjects with cutout treatment and sticker outlines.
Add a large outlined comic headline with invented text.
Include playful foreground props and a tilted inset panel.
Keep deliberate print or compression texture controlled and high resolution.
avoid: Do not recreate the original person, pose, clothes, props, brands, text, or story.
Do not include watermarks, usernames, platform logos, QR codes, or creator IDs.
Do not use recognizable real brands or copied package design.
Do not shift into sparse minimalist design, clean fashion editorial, 3D render, anime, or flat vector art.
Do not let accidental noise, illegible type, or muddy AI texture overwhelm the collage.
negative_prompt: No original reference subject, no copied pose, no original props or products, no recognizable brands, no copied slogans, no creator signature, no usernames, no watermarks, no QR codes, no platform UI, no clean minimalist layout, no luxury editorial, no 3D render, no anime conversion, no flat vector-only illustration, no fake brand logos, no illegible headline, no accidental compression artifacts, no muddy pixel noise.

values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: oversized cutout subject, tilted inset panel, thick sticker outlines, comic headline, saturated yellow-blue-green accents, foreground sticker props, speech bubble symbols, high-contrast photoreal collage
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no seated source pose, no soda can, no pizza, no caution sign, no copied shirt text, no original bottom slogan, no watermark, no real brand logos

values.LOCATION: a narrow retro arcade aisle with patterned carpet, lit cabinet sides, and reflective glass
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: tilted inset photo of a teammate testing buttons, speech bubble, coin stickers, cable loops, and cropped cabinet art with no real logos
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: oversized mechanic shirt, baggy work jeans, bright cap, chunky sneakers, and enamel-style patches with invented symbols
